info.longName: GraniteShares ETF Trust - GraniteShares Nasdaq Select Disruptors ETF

funds_data.description: The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its assets (exclusive of collateral held from securities lending) in the securities included in the index. The index is designed by Nasdaq Inc. (the “index provider”) to track the performance of large-cap, U.S.-listed companies, with high disruption scores.

top_holdings.Name: Palantir Technologies Inc Ordinary Shares - Class A
